Component.Name: ItemEdit
Component.Caption: C(ItemStatic)
Component.Validators: ItempriceItemValid(Item, Reprice, ItmDescription, UnitPrice1, ItmUM, CurrCode, DerQtyOnHand, ItmUnitCost, ItmCurUCost, Pricecode, PriDescription, ItmProductCode)

Component.Name: ItemGridCol
Component.Validators: ItempriceItemValid(Item, Reprice, ItmDescription, UnitPrice1, ItmUM, CurrCode, DerQtyOnHand, ItmUnitCost, ItmCurUCost, Pricecode, PriDescription, ItmProductCode)

EventHandler.Name: CalcUnitPrice1
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItemprices.CalcUnitPrice1Sp( PARMS(VAR P(CurrCode), RVAR P(UnitPrice1), VAR P(Item), VAR , VAR , VAR , VAR , VAR ) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCurrParms.GetSystemParm( PARMS(RVAR V(CurrParmsCurrCode), VAR curr_code) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR ItemPricing, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompletedxx
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_StdObjectSelectCurrentCompletedxx_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() Dim bEnabled As Boolean
bEnabled = Not ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew
ThisForm.Components("RecalculateButton").Enabled = bEnabled ThisF
EventHandler.Response2:
orm.Components("TranslateButton").Enabled = bEnabled
End Sub End Class End Namespace )

Variable.Name: ehm1_RecalculateButton0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(UnitPrice1), VAR P(UnitPrice2), VAR P(UnitPrice3), VAR P(UnitPrice4), VAR P(UnitPrice5), VAR P(UnitPrice6), VAR P(ItmUnitCost), VAR P(Item), VAR P(CurrCode), VAR P(EffectDate), VAR P(DolPercent_1), VAR P(DolPercent_2), VAR P(DolPercent_3)', VAR P(DolPercent_4), VAR P(DolPercent_5), VAR P(BaseCode_1), VAR P(BaseCode_2), VAR P(BaseCode_3), VAR P(BaseCode_4), VAR P(BaseCode_5), VAR P(BrkQty_1), VAR P(BrkQty_2), VAR P(BrkQty_3), VAR P(BrkQty_4), VAR P(BrkQty_5), VAR P(BrkPrice_1), VAR P(
Variable.Value2: BrkPrice_2), VAR P(BrkPrice_3), VAR P(BrkPrice_4), VAR P(BrkPrice_5), RVAR P(DerUnitPrice1), RVAR P(DerUnitPrice2), RVAR P(DerUnitPrice3), RVAR P(DerUnitPrice4), RVAR P(DerUnitPrice5))

Variable.Name: LinkVariableList
Variable.Value: CurrCode = P(CurrCode), Item = P(Item), ItmDescription = P(ItmDescription), ItmUnitCost = P(ItmUnitCost), ItmCurUCost = P(ItmCurUCost), DolPercent_1 = P(DolPercent_1), DolPercent_2 = P(DolPercent_2), DolPercent_3 = P(DolPercent_3), DolPercent_4 = P(DolPercent_4), DolPercent_5 = P(DolPercent_5), UnitPrice1 = P(UnitPrice1), UnitPrice2 = P(UnitPrice2), UnitPrice3 = P(UnitPrice3), UnitPrice4 = P(UnitPrice4), UnitPrice5 = P(UnitPrice5), UnitPrice6 = P(UnitPrice6), BrkPrice_5 = P(BrkPrice_5), BrkPrice
Variable.Value2: _4 = P(BrkPrice_4), BrkPrice_3 = P(BrkPrice_3), BrkPrice_2 = P(BrkPrice_2), BrkPrice_1 = P(BrkPrice_1), DerUnitPrice1 = P(DerUnitPrice1), DerUnitPrice2 = P(DerUnitPrice2), DerUnitPrice3 = P(DerUnitPrice3)

Variable.Name: LinkVariableList2
Variable.Value: , DerUnitPrice4 = P(DerUnitPrice4), DerUnitPrice5 = P(DerUnitPrice5), EffectDate = P(EffectDate)

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Reprice") = "1" And ThisForm.IsLinkedChild And (ThisForm.ParentFormName = "Items" Or ThisForm.ParentFormName = "Items.gen2") Then
If ThisForm.IsLinkedChild And (ThisForm.ParentFormName = "Items" Or ThisForm.ParentFormName = "Items.gen2") Then
